title: Sabo’s Memory and Fujitora’s Choice — Closing Beat
description: Sabo reflects on Ace and Luffy while Fujitora confronts the truth of Dressrosa.
scene: On pages 13–16, Luffy, Sabo, Dressrosa Citizens, Trafalgar Law, Rebecca deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Remember when we stole Dadan's sake and exchanged...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Whabat's bloing GoN!? I bleenght you wagh AAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Bwaaaagh Swagh Youth Youth Youth Youth Youth Youth Youth Youth Youth Youth Youth Youth Youth Youth Youth Youth Youth Youth Youth Youth Youth YouBH AH!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: I saw ace mur- Dered right before my own eyes!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Yeah. Ace has died, but... I'm glad you managed to make it out of there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I was about to lose my only two brothers without being able to do anything about it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: If you would've gotten killed as well... I'd have been all alone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Thank you for staying alive, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Eat the meta Mera No mi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Mmmmm! That'd be for the best!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: I got to see his face.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: By the way, this is a VIVE card for Luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I went ahead and made one.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: When'd you get the time to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: I've taken a piece for myself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: And, well ...I can only imagine what it's like trying to keep the reigns on Luffy, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: I'm leaving him in your hands!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: man, that's almost the exact same thing ace said to us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Roger. How was it? Luffy- Sun was quite...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Why the hell did you hang up, operator?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: way too close! That was too close for comfort, hack!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Can you bring these out whenever you want?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: The Elder Brother leaves... until the day they meet again!

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
